violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Inside of the refrigerated prep tables were found dirty. Shelving unit next to the ice machine was also found dirty. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine sanitizer was found at 0ppm. Chlorine solutions should be maintained at 50ppm for sanitizing food contact surfaces. **Corrected.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --Employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. Employee Red Bull can was found opened on prep table. Personal items should be stored separated from items used for food service.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
